---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a non-trivial change to an existing one.
title: 'feat: <one-line summary>'
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user-visible problem are you trying to solve? Be concrete — a
specific situation where the current behaviour is insufficient is more
useful than a generic "ai-hats should support X."

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen. CLI shape, file format, config key —
whatever the change actually touches.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is better.

## Scope / blast radius

- Which existing commands or files does this touch?
- Does it introduce a breaking change to the CLI surface or to
  `ai-hats.yaml`?
- Does it affect the privacy / security model?

## Additional context

Related issues, prior art in other tools, anything else worth knowing.

> If the idea is still half-formed, consider opening a
> [Discussion](https://github.com/muratovv/ai-hats/discussions) instead.
